paragraphs: JHYPCB is a reliable PCB manufacturer in China and offers rapid PCB prototype service for quick-turn PCB fabrication at high quality and low cost. We can prototype your PCB within 3-7 days.

JHYPCB offers full feature PCB manufacturing services with high reliability to be compatible with your requirement. PCB fabrication services include rigid FR4 PCB, Flexible PCB, Rigid-flex PCB, HDI PCB, High-Frequency PCB, Rogers PCB, Multilayer PCB, Heavy Copper PCB, etc.
Full turnkey PCB assembly services in China. JHYPCB specializes in prototype PCB assembly, quick turn PCB assembly, and low-to-high volume PCB assembly services with production capabilities.

We are a leading PCB manufacturing & PCB assembly manufacturer and supplier in China. We have over ten years of experience in custom PCB fabrication and assembly with advanced PCB technology, high-quality standards & RoHS compliance.

A full-service electronic manufacturing company headquartered in China specializes in printed circuit board manufacturing and assembly services. We will provide a full range of technical support and services for the smooth progress of your project.

Home Services Projects Single-Sided Flexible PCB Fabrication & Assembly Services JHYPCB is a China-based flexible PCB manufacturer specializing in single-sided flexible PCBs for prototypes, small-batch and mass production. We offer polyimide flex circuits with fast lead time, stable quality and competitive pricing for wearable, medical, automotive and other electronic applications. Send your Gerber files for a free DFM review and quick quotation within 24 hours.

A single-sided flexible PCB is a flex circuit with copper traces on only one side of a flexible insulating film such as polyimide. It combines the electrical function of a printed circuit board with the bendability of a cable, allowing the circuit to be folded, twisted and routed in three-dimensional space.

Compared with rigid PCBs , single-sided flex circuits use flexible materials instead of FR-4 and are much thinner and lighter. They are ideal for connecting different functional modules inside compact electronic products where space is limited and repeated bending is required.

In many designs, a single-sided flexible PCB is the most cost-effective flex solution because the structure is simple and only one copper layer is needed. When the circuit can be routed on a single layer, choosing single-sided flex can reduce material usage, simplify manufacturing and shorten lead time.
Only one copper layer on flexible polyimide film for simple and reliable flex circuits.

JHYPCB is an experienced flexible PCB manufacturer focusing on single-sided, double-sided and multilayer flex circuits for global customers. With advanced production equipment and strict quality control, we can deliver reliable single-sided flexible PCBs from rapid prototypes to mass production. Our engineering team works closely with you to optimize design, reduce cost and shorten time to market for your flex PCB projects.
Send your Gerber files and requirements to sales@pcbjhy.com to get a free quotation and DFM review for your single-sided flex PCB project.
